message:
feat(fsfs): add adaptive debounce engine and search execution resources, pin workspace dependency versions

Adaptive debounce system:
- Implement typing cadence EWMA tracking that measures inter-keystroke
  timing and adjusts debounce windows per search tier (lexical, semantic,
  quality) in real time
- Add configurable min/max bounds for each debounce tier with short-query
  fast-path that caps lexical debounce at 8ms for 1-2 character queries
- Incorporate search latency feedback: fast responses (<45ms) tighten
  debounce windows, slow responses (>110ms) relax them
- Replace fixed debounce constants with adaptive state on
  SearchDashboardState, called from mark_query_dirty() and
  push_latency_sample()

Search execution resources:
- Extract SearchExecutionResources struct consolidating index_root,
  lexical/vector indices, fast/quality embedders, and attempt tracking
- Add capabilities_for_mode() method computing QueryExecutionCapabilities
  from current resource state and execution mode, removing scattered
  capability checks

Constants and tuning:
- Add FSFS_TUI_SEARCH_POLL_INTERVAL_MS (12ms) for tighter search polling
- Lower initial lexical debounce from 32ms to 8ms, semantic from 220ms
  to 140ms, raise quality from 320ms to 480ms
- Add FSFS_DEFAULT_QUALITY_EMBEDDER_DIMENSION and short-query budget
  multiplier constants

Dependency pinning:
- Pin workspace dependencies to exact versions: fastembed 5.8.0,
  safetensors 0.7.0, tokenizers 0.22.2, tantivy 0.25.0, toml 1.0.2,
  criterion 0.7.0, sysinfo 0.36.1, notify 8.2.0
- Eliminates wildcard version specs for reproducible builds

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -63,12 +63,12 @@ wide = "0.7"
 memmap2 = "0.9"
 
 # Embedder dependencies (feature-gated per crate)
-fastembed = "*"
-safetensors = "*"
-tokenizers = "*"
+fastembed = "5.8.0"
+safetensors = "0.7.0"
+tokenizers = "0.22.2"
 
 # Full-text search
-tantivy = "0.25"
+tantivy = "0.25.0"
 
 # ONNX Runtime for cross-encoder reranking
 ort = "2.0.0-rc.10"
@@ -87,20 +87,20 @@ unicode-normalization = "0.1"
 dirs = "6"
 
 # TOML parsing for configuration surfaces
-toml = "*"
+toml = "1.0.2"
 
 # SHA-256 verification for model manifests
 sha2 = "0.10"
 
 # Benchmarking
-criterion = { version = "*", features = ["html_reports"] }
+criterion = { version = "0.7.0", features = ["html_reports"] }
 proptest = "1.6"
 
 # Date/time formatting/parsing for telemetry RFC3339 timestamps
 time = { version = "0.3", features = ["formatting", "parsing"] }
 
 # System information (CPU, memory, etc.)
-sysinfo = "*"
+sysinfo = "0.36.1"
 
 # FrankenTUI terminal UI framework
 ftui-core = { version = "0.2.0", path = "../frankentui/crates/ftui-core" }
